tasks.task_goal: Slice a loaf of crusty sourdough for sandwiches
tasks.expected_outcome: Even slices are produced without crushing the loaf, ready for making sandwiches
required_tool_attributes: long serrated edge to concentrate stress on tough crust
thin, sharp bevel to minimize drag
rigid blade to prevent flex during sawing
ergonomic handle for controlled shearing force

tasks.task_goal: Trim protruding zip-tie tails in a server rack
tasks.expected_outcome: Zip-tie ends are cut flush to the locking head, leaving no sharp snagging edges
required_tool_attributes: flush-ground, razor-sharp jaws for near-surface cutting
hardened cutting edges to withstand high local stress
tight pivot alignment for precise shearing
leveraged handle geometry for force multiplication

tasks.task_goal: Cut vinyl aquarium tubing to a precise length
tasks.expected_outcome: Tubing ends are square and clean, ensuring a tight, leak-free fit
required_tool_attributes: curved, sharp blade to focus shear on soft tubing
rigid anvil jaw to oppose cutting force
aligned pivot for consistent edge contact
non-flexing handles for steady pressure

tasks.task_goal: Prune overgrown rose bush canes cleanly
tasks.expected_outcome: Stems are removed with clean, angled cuts that promote healthy regrowth
required_tool_attributes: keen, bypassing blades for scissor-like shear
rigid, forged steel construction to resist flex
compound leverage pivot to increase cutting force
curved blade geometry to keep the cut aligned

tasks.task_goal: Open a sealed plastic clamshell package
tasks.expected_outcome: Package is separated along a cut seam, allowing safe access to the product
required_tool_attributes: replaceable, ultra-sharp blade to create high stress concentration
rigid blade carrier to prevent wobble
secure blade lock to maintain cutting depth
thin edge for controlled penetration

tasks.task_goal: Cut an opening in drywall for an electrical outlet
tasks.expected_outcome: A rectangular opening is cut to size, allowing the outlet box to fit flush
required_tool_attributes: sharp, pointed tip for scoring and starting cuts
stiff blade support to transmit force without flex
thin, sharp edge for effective scoring and shearing
lockable blade position for consistent depth

tasks.task_goal: Cut 0.8 mm aluminum sheet to fabricate a small bracket
tasks.expected_outcome: Sheet is cut to the bracket’s outline with clean, controlled edges
required_tool_attributes: hardened, sharp cutting edges for metal shearing
compound leverage pivot to amplify force
rigid handles to prevent torsional flex
aligned jaws to maintain a narrow kerf

tasks.task_goal: Cut a wooden dowel to length for shelving pegs
tasks.expected_outcome: Dowel segments have square, smooth ends suitable for insertion
required_tool_attributes: fine, sharp teeth to shear wood fibers cleanly
rigid spine to keep the blade straight
tooth set to clear sawdust (kerf control)
stiff blade to avoid wandering

tasks.task_goal: Remove a damaged section of carpet for patching
tasks.expected_outcome: The damaged area is cut out cleanly along the pile direction with minimal fraying
required_tool_attributes: hooked, replaceable sharp blade to engage fibers
rigid handle to apply controlled force
thin cutting edge to concentrate shear
secure blade clamp to prevent flex or slip

tasks.task_goal: Cut cotton fabric panels for a quilt
tasks.expected_outcome: Fabric is cut into accurate, clean-edged panels that match the cutting mat grid
required_tool_attributes: circular, ultra-sharp wheel to deliver continuous shear
rigid axle to prevent wobble
thin bevel for low cutting resistance
stable handle for straight, downward force

tasks.task_goal: Cut ceramic tiles to size for a backsplash
tasks.expected_outcome: Tiles are cut to precise dimensions with minimal chipping
required_tool_attributes: diamond-embedded cutting rim for hard, brittle material
rigid rotating disc to maintain a true edge
stable guide fence for straight cuts
stiff arbor mounting to resist deflection

tasks.task_goal: Cut copper plumbing pipe to replace a leaking segment
tasks.expected_outcome: Pipe ends are cut square and ready for fitting soldered or compression joints
required_tool_attributes: hardened steel cutting wheel to focus high local stress
rigid C-frame to hold alignment under load
feed screw to gradually increase shearing pressure
guide rollers to keep the cut square

tasks.task_goal: Snip support sprues off a plastic 3D print
tasks.expected_outcome: Supports are removed cleanly, leaving minimal marks on the model surface
required_tool_attributes: razor-sharp, flush-ground jaws for near-surface cuts
fine, pointed tips for access in tight spaces
hardened cutting edges to resist dulling
spring return for controlled, repeatable shearing

tasks.task_goal: Trim a small tree branch overhanging the driveway
tasks.expected_outcome: Branch is removed with a clean cut near the branch collar
required_tool_attributes: sharp, impulse-hardened teeth for aggressive shearing
rigid blade to prevent buckling under load
tooth set to clear kerf and prevent binding
handle geometry to deliver steady pull-cut force

tasks.task_goal: Slice foam board panels for an architectural model
tasks.expected_outcome: Foam board is cut into straight, smooth-edged panels without tearing the paper facing
required_tool_attributes: ultra-sharp, pointed blade for clean scoring and cuts
rigid handle to prevent blade flex
thin bevel to reduce crushing
secure blade lock for consistent depth

tasks.task_goal: Cut nylon rope to length for a campsite tarp ridgeline
tasks.expected_outcome: Rope is cleanly separated to the required length without excessive fraying
required_tool_attributes: sharp serrated edge to grip and shear fibers
rigid, locking blade to handle high localized force
corrosion-resistant hard steel to maintain edge
ergonomic handle for controlled slicing

tasks.task_goal: Trim printed handouts to final size for a meeting
tasks.expected_outcome: Stacks of paper are cut to consistent, clean edges matching the target dimensions
required_tool_attributes: long, sharp guillotine blade for shearing through stacks
rigid base and anvil edge for opposing force
levered pivot to amplify cutting force
paper clamp to prevent sheet shift during shear

tasks.task_goal: Cut a gasket from sheet rubber for a faucet repair
tasks.expected_outcome: A precisely shaped rubber gasket is produced with smooth edges for a proper seal
required_tool_attributes: sharp pointed blade for detailed curves
rigid blade support to avoid flex in thick rubber
thin cutting edge for high stress concentration
secure grip for controlled pressure

tasks.task_goal: Cut a ribeye steak into bite-sized pieces at the table
tasks.expected_outcome: The steak is portioned cleanly without tearing the meat fibers
required_tool_attributes: sharp fine or micro-serrated edge to shear cooked fibers
rigid, narrow blade for precise cuts
pointed tip to initiate cuts
hard steel to sustain a sharp edge

tasks.task_goal: Cut a steel rod to length for a shelf bracket
tasks.expected_outcome: Steel rod sections are cut to specified lengths with straight kerfs ready for deburring
required_tool_attributes: hardened, fine-tooth blade for metal shearing
high-tension, rigid frame to keep the blade straight
narrow kerf to reduce cutting effort
ergonomic handle for steady stroke control
